TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sumamad_izaw_kiya_makasicay_a_niyazu', title = sumamad_izaw_kiya_makasicay_a_niyazu', year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sumamad_izaw_kiya_makasicay_a_niyazu'} }

S.FORM: sumamad izaw kiya makasicay a niyazu',lumuwa,ma'pahay i cuwacuwa maazih tu.śąĎnuzikuzan nu taku,izaw tahkal maazih kiya ma'desay mukanay tu tademaw atu aadupen a di'tu nu nanum,izaw kiya ma'desay a di'tu,uzuma satabaki sa ku laing malabalad. izaw kiya tatama a wawa,makudus adidi',mapidah,kalaangic,pangangan han nibaki niza ci pusi han.
S.PHON: sumamad izaw kija makasi ¶aj a nijazu Ē~ °,r~…ĺumuwa,ma Ē~ °pańßaj i ¶uwa ¶uwa maazińß tu.*nuzikuzan nu taku,izaw tańßkar~…ĺ maazińß kija ma Ē~ °d…ôsaj mukanaj tu tad…ômaw atu aadup…ôn a di Ē~ °tu nu nanum,izaw kija ma Ē~ °d…ôsaj a di Ē~ °tu,uzuma satabaki sa ku r~…ĺaiŇč mar~…ĺabar~…ĺad. izaw kija tatama a wawa,makudus adidi Ē~ °,mapidańß,kar~…ĺaaŇči ¶,paŇčaŇčan ńßan nibaki niza ¶i pusi ńßan.
S.FORM: sumamad izaw kiya makasicay a niyazu',lumuwa,ma'pahay i cuwacuwa maazih tu.śąĎnuzikuzan nu taku,izaw tahkal maazih kiya ma'desay mukanay tu tademaw atu aadupen a di'tu nu nanum,izaw kiya ma'desay a di'tu,uzuma satabaki sa ku laing malabalad. izaw kiya tatama a wawa,makudus adidi',mapidah,kalaangic,pangangan han nibaki niza ci pusi han.
S.PHON: sumamad izaw kija makasi ¶aj a nijazu Ē~ °,r~…ĺumuwa,ma Ē~ °pańßaj i ¶uwa ¶uwa maazińß tu.*nuzikuzan nu taku,izaw tańßkar~…ĺ maazińß kija ma Ē~ °d…ôsaj mukanaj tu tad…ômaw atu aadup…ôn a di Ē~ °tu nu nanum,izaw kija ma Ē~ °d…ôsaj a di Ē~ °tu,uzuma satabaki sa ku r~…ĺaiŇč mar~…ĺabar~…ĺad. izaw kija tatama a wawa,makudus adidi Ē~ °,mapidańß,kar~…ĺaaŇči ¶,paŇčaŇčan ńßan nibaki niza ¶i pusi ńßan.
